# Bineesh S

Developer portfolio of Bineesh S: Tech-Driven Innovator, Tech Entrepreneur, AI Expert, Python Developer, and Cybersecurity professional. Founder of Fusintech and Co-founder & COO of Corepro Techno LLP.

## About
* **Bio**: Founder of Fusintech and Co-founder & COO of Corepro Techno LLP. Aspiring Full-Stack Developer specializing in Industry 4.0 technologies (AI, Full Stack, Cybersecurity). Proactive, self-taught, and passionate about creating modern, robust applications, designing intelligent platforms, and solving complex technical challenges.
* **Location**: Alappuzha, Kerala, India
* **Resume/Portfolio**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/
* **Email**: sbineesh172@gmail.com
* **Phone**: +91 95673 14355
* **LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bineesh627
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627
* **Hugging Face**: https://huggingface.co/bineesh627
* **Twitter/X**: https://twitter.com/bineesh627
* **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/dream_boy_.627
* **WhatsApp**: https://wa.me/+919567314355

---

## Core Technical Skills

### Artificial Intelligence & ML
* Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Natural Language Processing, Computer Vision, Federated Learning, Explainable AI (XAI)
* PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Langchain, ChromaDB, AI Model Development, Data Analysis

### Backend Development
* Python, Django, Node.js, MySQL, MongoDB, SQLite, REST APIs

### Frontend & Mobile Development
* HTML, CSS, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, React Native, Expo, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS, NativeWind, UI/UX Design

### Cybersecurity
* Penetration Testing, Ethical Hacking, Network Security, Vulnerability Assessment, Security Auditing, Risk Assessment, Incident Response, OSINT
* Tools: Linux, Burp Suite, Nmap, Postman, Telethon

### Video & AI Media Production
* Video Editing, Advanced Image Generation Integration, Image-Fade Animations, AI Video Generation Models

---

## Professional Experience

### Video Editor & AI Content Creator (Part-time, Remote)
* **Company**: Pydart Intelli Corp Pvt Ltd (March 2026 - Present)
* **Description**: Integrating advanced AI image generation models to create dynamic video components, designing seamless image-fade transitions, and leveraging cutting-edge generative video tools for high-engagement content.

### Co-founder & COO (Part-time, Remote)
* **Company**: Corepro Techno LLP (March 2026 - Present)
* **Description**: Directing operational and technical strategies to build custom software products and IT services. Official website: www.coreprotechno.com

### Founder & CEO (Full-time, Remote)
* **Company**: Fusintech [EdTech Platform] (December 2025 - Present)
* **Description**: Established and leading Fusintech, an innovative EdTech platform leveraging artificial intelligence for personalized, interactive, and accessible learning experiences.

### Cyber Security Intern (Remote)
* **Company**: RedTeam Hacker Academy, Trivandrum (October 2024 - November 2024)
* **Description**: Gained hands-on knowledge in ethical hacking, penetration testing methodology, web application security vulnerabilities, network defense, and basic security configuration standards.

---

## Featured Projects

### cervical_ai (ID: 8)
* **Description**: A privacy-preserving multimodal AI system utilizing PyTorch models and the Flower federated learning framework for early cervical cancer detection. Integrates SHAP and Grad-CAM for explainable AI.
* **Tech**: Python, Django, PyTorch, Federated Learning, Explainable AI
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/cervical_ai
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/8

### RAG Chatbot (ID: 1)
* **Description**: Developed a college chatbot leveraging Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) in collaboration with the principal. Employs intelligent agents to extract info from the college website and PDFs, with an admin panel.
* **Tech**: Python, Bootstrap, Django, Langchain, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Numpy, ChromaDB
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/college_chatbot
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/1

### TruthGuard Fake News Detector (ID: 7)
* **Description**: A Django-based web application that uses a TensorFlow/Keras LSTM neural network to detect fake news from text or URLs in real-time.
* **Tech**: Django, TensorFlow, Python, Bootstrap, Tailwind CSS
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/fakenewsdetector
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/7

### Culinary Community & Sharing Platform (RecipeRave) (ID: 2)
* **Description**: A culinary sharing platform where users can follow creators, explore, and share recipes.
* **Tech**: Python, Django, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Bootstrap
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/reciperave
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/2

### MobileInfoga (ID: 3)
* **Description**: An OSINT tool designed to gather phone number information (country of origin, carrier details, online associations).
* **Tech**: Python, Telethon, Phonenumbers
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/MobileInfoga
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/3

### selio_marketing_co (ID: 4)
* **Description**: A freelance web application project built for the Selio Marketing digital agency to display their digital services and handle lead capture.
* **Tech**: TypeScript, HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/selio_marketing_co
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/4

### vehicle-rental-service (ID: 5)
* **Description**: An enterprise fleet management mobile application and Django API supporting multi-tier roles, concurrency booking locks, dynamic pricing, and KYC validation.
* **Tech**: React Native, Expo, Django, Python, TypeScript, NativeWind
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/vehicle-rental-service
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/5

### ev-stations-locator (ID: 6)
* **Description**: A web utility mapping and locating nearby electric vehicle charging stations, integrating Google Maps API and routing systems.
* **Tech**: HTML, CSS, JavaScript
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/ev-stations-locator
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/6

### e_shop (ID: 9)
* **Description**: An interactive, fully functional e-commerce storefront with cart logic, search autocompletion, checkout modals, and responsive layout rows.
* **Tech**: JavaScript, HTML, CSS, Node.js
* **GitHub**: https://github.com/Bineesh627/e_shop
* **Case Study**: https://bineeshs.vercel.app/projects/9

## Key Achievements

### Dr. C.V. Raman Foundation Award
* **Award**: Innovative Thinker & Innovative Person Award (Presented by Ramesh Chennithala, former Kerala Home Minister and MLA) on January 29, 2025.
* **Details**: Recognized for creativity, research, and technical innovation in the field of AI and entrepreneurship.

### Martial Arts Milestone
* **Achievement**: Earning Sho Dan (1st Dan) Black Belt from Focus Sports Karate Club in December 2019 after years of disciplined training.

  * Institution: G.H.S.S Mangalam School, Aratupuzha
* **Secondary School School Certificate (SSLC)** (Graduated March 2020)
